basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Dr Inventory $100 / Cr Cash $100. Inventory=Inventories. Amounts exact.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Dr Inventory $300 / Cr Accounts Payable $300. Inventory=Inventories, Accounts Payable=Trade payables. Amounts exact.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Dr Cash $180 / Cr Common Stock $100 / Cr Additional Paid-In Capital $80. Common Stock=Share capital-Common, APIC matches. Amounts exact.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Dr Cash $500 / Dr COGS $300 / Cr Sales Revenue $500 / Cr Inventory $300. All semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Dr Accounts Payable $50 / Cr Cash $50. Accounts Payable=Trade payables. Amounts exact.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Dr Notes Payable - Old $100 / Cr Notes Payable - New $100. Sub-labels acceptable. Amounts exact.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Dr Loans Payable $200 / Cr Common Shares $200. Loans Payable=Notes payable, Common Shares=Share capital-Common. Amounts exact.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Dr Customer Deposits $100 / Cr Service Revenue $100. Customer Deposits=Contract liabilities, Service Revenue=Revenue. Amounts exact.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Dr Treasury Stock $200 / Cr Cash $200. Treasury Stock=Treasury shares. Amounts exact.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Dr Retained Earnings $500,000 / Cr Dividends Payable $500,000. Exact match.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Dr Preferred Shares $100 / Cr Common Shares $100. Semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Dr Salaries Expense $100 / Cr Cash $100. Exact match.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Dr Utilities Expense $50 / Cr Accounts Payable $50. Expected Cr Accrued liabilities. AP is not semantically equivalent to Accrued liabilities for an accrual entry.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Dr Loss on Inventory Destruction $2,000 / Cr Inventory $2,000. Loss on Inventory Destruction=Casualty loss. Amounts exact.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both actual and expected journal_entry are null. No entry needed.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Dr Machinery $800K / Cr Accounts Payable $700K / Cr Cash $100K. Semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Dr Machinery $200K / Cr Cash $200K. Semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Cash $2,657,687 vs expected $2,657,510. Discount $342,313 vs expected $342,490. PV calculation error ($177 difference). Structure correct but amounts wrong.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Dr Warranty Expense $900K / Cr Warranty Liability $900K. Semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Actual splits debit into Marine Structure $4M + ARO Component $1.95M. Expected combines as single Dr PP&E Marine structures $5,950,000. Structural difference.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Dr APIC $10K vs expected Dr Retained earnings $10K. Wrong account for share repurchase excess. Substantive accounting difference.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Dr Inventory $1,150K / Dr Storage Expense $20K / Dr Freight-Out Expense $50K / Cr AP $1M / Cr Cash $220K. Storage=Warehousing, Freight-Out=Distribution costs. Amounts exact.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Dr Prepaid Inventory $1M / Cr Cash $1M. Prepaid Inventory=Prepayments. Amounts exact.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Actual uses net PV method (Dr Land $49,173,240 / Cr LT Notes Payable $49,173,240). Expected uses gross method with discount contra-liability. Missing discount line. Different structure.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Actual lumps both into single Dr Land Improvements $4,110K. Expected separates Site improvements $1,750K and Land $2,360K. Classification difference.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Dr Charitable Donations Expense $1M / Cr Notes Payable $1M. Semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Dr Delivery Vehicle $40K / Cr Cash $20K / Cr Notes Payable $20K. Delivery Vehicle=PP&E Vehicles. Amounts exact.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Dr Cash $200K / Cr Notes Payable $200K. Notes Payable=Long-term borrowings. Amounts exact.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Dr Cash - Chequing Account $5K / Cr Unearned Revenue $5K. Cash-Chequing matches. Unearned Revenue=Contract liabilities. Amounts exact.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Actual splits office items: Dr Office Furniture $2K + Dr Computer Equipment $3.5K + Dr Vehicles $250K. Expected combines as Dr PP&E Office equipment $5,500. Over-split (3 debits vs 2).

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Dr Cash $25,500 / Cr Service Revenue $25,500. Semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Dr Accounts Receivable $31,500 / Cr Service Revenue $31,500. Semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: Expected Cr Cash--chequing $50K, actual Cr Cash $50K. Sub-account specificity (transaction says paid by cheque).

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Dr Cash-Chequing $45,900 / Dr AR $30K / Dr COGS $55,500 / Cr Sales Revenue $69K / Cr Sales Tax Payable $6,900 / Cr Inventory $55,500. All amounts exact. Semantically equivalent.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Dr Factory Electricity Expense $15K vs expected Dr WIP Manufacturing overhead $15K. Factory electricity should be capitalized to WIP (product cost), not expensed (period cost). Substantive classification difference.

int_24_advertising.reason: Actual splits HST: Dr Advertising $19,469.03 + Dr HST Recoverable $2,530.97 / Cr Cash $22K. Only difference is tax-related. Tax-relaxed valid.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Dr Land $6M / Dr Building $3M / Dr HST Recoverable $300K / Cr Cash $4.8M / Cr AP $4.5M. Expected Cr Other payables, not AP. HST Recoverable=VAT receivable (equivalent). AP vs Other payables is a classification difference.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Dr Manufacturing Wages Expense $25K vs expected Dr WIP Direct labour $25K (should be capitalized to WIP, not expensed). Also over-splits withholdings into 4 lines.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Actual treats entire $14,050 as liability clearance (4 payable debits). Missing Dr Employee benefits expense $6,300 for employer matching. Substantive error.

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Dr Marketing Expense $7K / Cr Cash $7K. Marketing=Advertising expense for promotional literature. Amounts exact.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Dr Vehicle $52,800 / Cr Dealer Financing Payable $52,800. Vehicle=PP&E Vehicles, Dealer Financing Payable=Other payables. Non-recoverable tax correctly capitalized.
